EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IProjectiveTransformation2D

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that define and manipulate projective transformations.

[Guid("1C8A72C4-5A43-48EF-938E-2119608D77D0")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IProjectiveTransformation2D : ITransformation

Properties

SpatialReference

The spatial reference in which this transformation is meaningful.

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

Property Value

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

DefineFromControlPoints(int, ref IPoint, ref IPoint)

Defines the best projective transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

void DefineFromControlPoints(int numPoints, ref IPoint fromPoints, ref IPoint toPoints)

Parameters

numPoints int
fromPoints IPoint
toPoints IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineFromControlPointsEx(int, ref WKSPoint, ref WKSPoint) 

void DefineFromControlPointsEx(int numPoints, ref WKSPoint fromPoints, ref WKSPoint toPoints)

Parameters

numPoints int
fromPoints WKSPoint
toPoints WKSPoint

GetControlPointError(int, out double, out double)

Returns the errors involved in moving control point i from the 'from' to 'to' system. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

void GetControlPointError(int i, out double fromError, out double toError)

Parameters

i int
fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetRMSError(out double, out double)

RMS (Root Mean Square) error expressed relative to the 'from' and 'to' points defining the transformation. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

void GetRMSError(out double fromError, out double toError)

Parameters

fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Project(ISpatialReference) 

void Project(ISpatialReference newSpatialReference)

Parameters

newSpatialReference ISpatialReference

QueryTransformationParameters(esriTransformDirection, ref double)

Returns the eight parameters which define the two dimensional projective transformation.

void QueryTransformationParameters(esriTransformDirection Direction, ref double @params)

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
params double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Reset()

Resets the tranformation.

void Reset()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetTransformationParameters(esriTransformDirection, ref double)

Sets the eight parameters which define the two dimensional projective transformation.

Direction esriTransformDirection
